name: search youtube
description: Search YouTube for videos matching a query.
author: cursorvoice

name: search github
description: Search GitHub repositories and code for a query.
author: cursorvoice

name: search wikipedia
description: Open a Wikipedia search for a topic in the browser.
author: cursorvoice

name: define word
description: Look up the definition of a word.
author: cursorvoice

name: translate text
description: Translate text to English (auto-detects the source language).
author: cursorvoice

name: search maps
description: Find a place or address on the map.
author: cursorvoice

name: search stack overflow
description: Search Stack Overflow for a programming question.
author: cursorvoice

name: say it
description: Speak the given text aloud with the macOS 'say' command.
author: cursorvoice

name: sleep display
description: Put the Mac's display to sleep (locks the screen if a password is required on wake).
author: cursorvoice
